pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in export_result.sh (EXPECTED_TITLE) and verified in task.json description.
Explicitly checked in export_result.sh via grep for 'dashboard' in tiddler tags.
Explicitly seeded in setup_task.sh as 'tags: EnergySource' and checked in export_result.sh via filter text matching.
Explicitly checked in export_result.sh which greps the tiddler text for '<$select', '<$transclude' (or '{{'), and '$:/state/'.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the 4 energy source tiddlers (Solar, Wind, Geothermal, Hydroelectric) are synthetically generated directly via setup_task.sh. The expected dashboard title 'Energy Comparison Dashboard', target tag 'Dashboard', source filter tag 'EnergySource', and the required widgets ('<$select', '<$transclude', '$:/state/') are exactly enforced by the export_result.sh and verifier.py evaluation logic.
